text: Bengal gram flour ... 15 g Roasted & crushed Groundnut ... 5 g Sugar ... 15 g Method :Roast whole wheat and powder. Add roasted Bengal gram flour, groundnut and sugar. Cook with sufficient water. Vermicelli/Rice ... 30 g Milk ... 100 ml. Water ... As required Jaggery ... 20 g Method :Boil rice/vermicelli in water till half done. Add milk and bring to boil. Add jaggery and cook well. Note: 1. All these recipes provide approximately 250 Kcals. and 5 g proteins and amounts given are for 2 servings. 2. Recipes Nos.2 and 3 can be prepared and stored in airtight containers to be used whenever required. 3. Non-vegetarian foods such as soft boiled egg, minced meat may be introduced at the age of 6 months. 1. Kichidi 2. Malted Ragi Porridge 3. Wheat Payasam 4. Kheer 33 34 Guideline 5 Why do
